mapper.select: SELECT f.id,f.f_bill_no,f.f_name,s.name as f_supplierId,b.number as f_materialId,fp.fmaterial_name,fp.FFROMQTY,fp.f_to_qty,fp.f_after_price,fp.f_after_tax_price, fp.f_effective_date,fp.f_expiry_date,f.f_document_status,bd.name as f_currency_id,fp.f_after_price_coefficient,su.user_name as create_by,f.create_time FROM f_billhead f INNER JOIN f_fpur_patentry fp on f.f_bill_no = fp.f_number INNER JOIN supplier s ON fp.f_supplier_id = s.supplierid INNER JOIN by_material b on fp.f_material_id = b.k3_id INNER JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bd ON fp.f_currency_id = bd.kingdee and bd.category= 'currency' INNER JOIN sys_user su ON f.create_by = su.k3_key ${ew.customSqlSegment}
